input.title: Comprehensive Fitness & Gym Management System
input.description: An all-in-one software platform for modern gyms and fitness clubs. It serves members via a mobile application for booking classes, tracking progress, and communicating with trainers, while providing gym staff and administration a robust web portal. The system handles recurring billing, facility access control, shift scheduling, POS (Point of Sale) for supplements, and integrated IoT data from wearables.

user_classes.Gym Member: A paying customer who uses the mobile app to book classes, log workouts, and enter the facility.
user_classes.Personal Trainer: A staff member who manages their schedule, assigns workout/nutrition plans to clients, and monitors their progress.
user_classes.Front Desk Staff: An employee handling access control, walk-ins, lead tracking, and point-of-sale transactions.
user_classes.Gym Admin / Owner: The high-level manager who defines membership tiers, reviews financial analytics, and oversees all club operations.

definitions.Class: A group fitness session (e.g., Yoga, HIIT) with a set capacity, time, and instructor.
definitions.Dunning: The process of communicating with customers to ensure the collection of accounts receivable (failed recurring payments).
definitions.Access QR: A dynamic QR code generated in the member app that rotates every 30 seconds to prevent sharing.

scope: Cross-platform mobile app (iOS/Android) for Gym Members and Trainers
Web-based Management Dashboard for Admins and Front Desk
Automated recurring payment collection via Stripe Billing
Waitlist mechanics that auto-enroll members if a spot opens up
Custom workout and diet plan builders for trainers to assign clients
Real-time chat functionality between members and trainers
out_of_scope: Proprietary hardware manufacturing (turnstiles/RFID scanners) - we only provide the software API to integrate with existing locks
Live video streaming of classes - the MVP will focus only on in-person scheduling
Detailed medical diagnosis or physical therapy logs - this is limited to baseline fitness tracking
constraints: The mobile app must utilize React Native to maintain a single codebase for iOS and Android
Payment processing must handle automated prorating during tier upgrades/downgrades
GraphQL must be used for the mobile API to minimize payload sizes on cellular connections
QR codes for access must fallback safely to local cache generation if offline

operating_environment.frontend: React Native (Mobile), Vue 3 + TailwindCSS (Admin Web Console).
operating_environment.backend: NestJS with Apollo Server serving GraphQL, containerized via Docker on AWS ECS.
operating_environment.database: PostgreSQL managed via AWS RDS, Redis for caching and waitlist queue management.

FR-01.title: Authentication & Multi-Role Architecture
requirements: Users authenticate securely via Email/Password or Apple/Google Sign-In
The backend resolves roles dynamically (Admin, Trainer, Staff, Member) yielding different UI views
Passwords must comply with minimum strength validations and store as bcrypt hashes

FR-02.title: Member Profile & Registration
requirements: Members capture physical demographics (height, target weight, age) during onboarding
Members must digitally sign a liability waiver before their account achieves 'Active' status
Profile allows members to attach emergency contact information

FR-03.title: Membership Tiers & Subscriptions
requirements: Admins can create distinct tiers (e.g., 'Basic', 'Premium', 'VIP') with predefined access rights
Members can upgrade/downgrade tiers in-app, triggering a prorated Stripe event natively
Subscriptions are billed cyclically (monthly/annually) via scheduled cron-jobs

FR-04.title: Digital Facility Access (QR Code Entry)
requirements: The mobile app generates an encrypted, time-based QR code for entry turnstiles
QR code generation rotates the payload every 30 seconds to prevent screenshot sharing
If a member's billing is in 'Past Due' state, the app renders a red 'Access Denied' state and hides the QR code

FR-05.title: Class Scheduling & Booking Engine
requirements: Admins configure repetitive weekly class schedules with capacity limitations
Members browse the upcoming 14 days and reserve spots with a single tap
Booking prevents multi-booking overlapping timeslots

FR-06.title: Automated Waitlist Management
requirements: If a class is full, members can opt into a priority-ranked Waitlist
If a booked member cancels, the system automatically pulls the #1 waitlist individual, books them, and dispatches a push notification
Waitlist auto-promotion freezes 1 hour before class start to prevent late-notice enrollments

FR-07.title: Personal Training Session CRM
requirements: Trainers explicitly block out their available 1-on-1 hours on an interactive calendar
Members can purchase 'PT Credits' and spend them to reserve slots instantly on the Trainer's calendar
Trainers can log session notes hidden from the member (e.g., 'struggles with form on deadlifts')

FR-08.title: Custom Workout Plan Builder
requirements: Trainers drag-and-drop exercises from a global master library to create weekly routines
Routines define explicit sets, reps, rest times, and target RPE (Rate of Perceived Exertion)
Members open their app, enter 'Workout Mode', and check off sets interactively as they train

FR-09.title: Diet & Macronutrient Logging
requirements: Trainers can set daily macro targets (Proteins, Carbs, Fats) for assigned clients
Members can quickly input caloric values or integrate barcode scanning for food input
Dashboard visually renders a progress bar toward daily intake goals

FR-10.title: Progress & Biometric Tracking
requirements: Members regularly log their body weight and tape measurements
System plots historical inputs on an interactive line-graph summarizing net changes
Members can upload secure 'Progress Pictures' locally encrypted into an app gallery

FR-11.title: Wearable Device Integration (HealthKit/Google Fit)
requirements: Mobile app connects natively to Apple HealthKit and Google Fit APIs
App selectively pulls daily step count and active calorie burn to complement app dashboard metrics
Pulled data executes read-only and respects OS-level privacy consents strictly

FR-12.title: Automated Dunning & Billing Retries
requirements: If a recurring card charge fails, system locks the access QR code instantly
A staggered dunning flow attempts re-capture on days 1, 3, and 7, sending customized emails
App prominently features an 'Update Payment Method' banner blocking normal interactions until resolved

FR-13.title: In-App Chat Messaging
requirements: Secure direct messaging channel specifically scoped between Members and assigned Trainers
Supports text and basic image attachments
Leverages WebSockets for real-time delivery and unread message indicators

FR-14.title: Push Notifications & Automated Reminders
requirements: Dispatch 2-hour preemptive push notifications prior to a booked Class or PT session
Send 'Missed Workout' push alerts if a member hasn't swiped into the gym for 14 consecutive days
User profile allows toggling specific notification channels (Marketing vs Transactional)

FR-15.title: Pro-Shop E-Commerce POS
requirements: Front Desk staff access a dedicated iPad view to ring up protein shakes, merch, or water bottles
Purchases can immediately charge to a member's 'Card on File' without needing physical swiping
Maintains inventory count limits, triggering low-stock admin warnings

FR-16.title: Lead Management & CRM (Prospects)
requirements: Unregistered walk-ins are captured into a Lead Table by the Front Desk
Leads are assigned designated follow-up dates
Leads automatically convert to 'Active' upon signing an electronic membership contract

FR-17.title: Staff Scheduling & Timesheets
requirements: Admins build weekly shift rosters ensuring proper Front Desk coverage
Staff members 'Clock In' and 'Clock Out' via the web portal using location-bounded IP verification
System exports timesheet data directly to standard payroll CSV format

FR-18.title: Customer Feedback & Ratings
requirements: Upon completing a class, the app prompts the member to rate the session (1-5 stars)
Ratings are averaged per instructor and aggregated in the Admin Analytics view
Low ratings (< 3 stars) prompt an optional text field for specific complaint logging

FR-19.title: Guest Pass & Referral Engine
requirements: Active members globally generate a unique Referral Link
Referral yields a 1-day Guest Pass automatically provisioned to the invitee's app
Successful conversion of a guest automatically credits the referrer's account with $20 account balance

FR-20.title: Admin Analytics & Reporting Dashboard
requirements: Admins view highly visual real-time charts depicting Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR)
System identifies 'At-Risk' members using an algorithm correlating declining attendance with high churn risk
Provides dense CSV exports for gross attendance per individual class type

NFR-01.title: System Performance
requirements: Mobile queries (GraphQL) must resolve in <300ms typical conditions
QR Code view inside the application must boot instantly, even under poor network coverage (employing local cache hashing)

NFR-02.title: Security & Regulatory
requirements: Platform complies fully with GDPR concerning the 'Right to be Forgotten' by executing hard-delete cascading upon request
Payment processing securely outsources full raw card numbers to Stripe ensuring strict PCI compliance

system_attributes.availability: Waitlist and recurring billing cron-jobs utilize distributed locking over Redis to guarantee that they only execute exactly once across multiple redundant worker instances.
system_attributes.security: TOTP logic natively protects internal QR Access Code synchronization ensuring time-drift on user devices does not compromise entrance security.

FR-01.title: Implement Central GraphQL Auth Middleware
FR-01.description: Establish the Apollo Auth context in the NestJS application. Verify incoming JWTs on headers, extract the user's encoded generic 'Role', and map the entity across globally protected resolvers.
acceptance_criteria: Unauthorized requests yield standard ApolloError codes.
Role mapping integrates perfectly into `@UseGuards()` logic.

FR-02.title: Build Member Profile & Digital Waiver UI
FR-02.description: Develop the React Native mobile screens for the introductory questionnaire and liability waiver. Use a react-native-signature-canvas to capture the digital signature explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Signature captures and saves as a Base64 string submitted to backend.
State strictly tracks completion progression, gating dashboard access.

FR-03.title: Integrate Stripe Subscriptions and Webhooks
FR-03.description: Create the heavy integration securely mapping local Subscription Tiers to Stripe Products/Prices. Implement webhook listeners for `customer.subscription.updated` to sync tier changes.
acceptance_criteria: Webhook signatures are validated against the Stripe shared secret.
Local PostgreSQL tier IDs stay in hard synchronization with external Stripe status.

FR-04.title: Develop Time-Based QR Code Generator Algorithm
FR-04.description: Write a secure TOTP-like algorithm generating encrypted payload strings combining `{userId}:{timestamp}{hash}`. Implement logic that forces the frontend React component to tick and redraw the code visually every 30 seconds.
acceptance_criteria: Backend validation successfully decrypts and tolerates a precise 30-second time-drift latency window.
React Native code leverages `setInterval` triggering localized re-renders cleanly without memory leaks.

FR-05.title: Design Interactive Mobile Class Calendar
FR-05.description: Create an intuitive horizontal scroll interface detailing daily class lists with clear visual indicators if a class is 'Booking Open', 'Waitlist', or 'Full'.
acceptance_criteria: Clean visual contrast emphasizes immediate action buttons.
Filter controls allow users to isolate specific class styles (e.g., 'Spinning only').

FR-05.title: Develop Concurrent Class Booking Resolver
FR-05.description: Write the GraphQL mutation securely reserving a space. Implement a serialized Redis transaction block testing capacity boundaries dynamically to negate race condition over-bookings.
acceptance_criteria: If completely full, mutation yields specific error code routing user organically to Waitlist prompt.

FR-06.title: Build Automated Waitlist Promotion Worker
FR-06.description: Create a background worker scanning Redis queues upon member cancellation events. Auto-enroll top queued index, charge class credit if necessary, and dispatch push.
acceptance_criteria: Queue logic observes exactly 1-hour freeze period prior to runtime.
If waitlist member lacks requisite billing/credits during promotion, skip and advance to next index.

FR-07.title: Develop Trainer Availability Matrix API
FR-07.description: Design endpoints allowing trainers to apply recurring Boolean rules matching 30 minute cells ('Available', 'Blocked').
acceptance_criteria: Matrix merges logically cleanly overlapping universal gym operational hours.

FR-08.title: Design Workout Execution Mode UI
FR-08.description: Wireframe the immersive workout state inside the mobile app ensuring large, easily-tap-able buttons intended for sweaty conditions and rapid transition flows between supersets.
acceptance_criteria: Implements native circular timer counting down rest periods vividly.
Provides embedded small GIF container demonstrating exercise form.

FR-09.title: Integrate Native Barcode Scanning Engine
FR-09.description: Deploy React Native Vision Camera bridging into a generic Food-DB API mapping barcode scans effortlessly into macronutrient aggregates.
acceptance_criteria: Camera invokes seamlessly without aggressive orientation glitches.
Unmapped barcodes provide clean fallback UI prompting manual text search.

FR-10.title: Implement Biometric Line Chart Components
FR-10.description: Utilize D3 or comparable low-level rendering tool adapting dynamic domains to gracefully interpret minor variable fluctuations in body weight clearly.
acceptance_criteria: Graphs support varying pinch-to-zoom intervals (7 Day, 30 Day, Year) seamlessly.

FR-11.title: Create Native Ecosystem Health Bridges
FR-11.description: Connect `react-native-health` specifically filtering queries strictly for basic steps/calorie outputs respecting iOS/Android security prompts.
acceptance_criteria: If consent denied conditionally hide specific target dashboard widget gracefully natively.

FR-12.title: Setup Dunning Workflow Automation
FR-12.description: Synchronize Stripe's internal Smart Retries configuration aligning securely alongside local Webhooks marking local Profile objects as 'PAST_DUE' toggling UI locking mechanism automatically.
acceptance_criteria: Successful generic payment hook restores Active profile seamlessly triggering unlocking push ping.

FR-13.title: Develop WebSockets Communication Broker
FR-13.description: Build nested socket rooms specifically binding `{Member_ID}-{Trainer_ID}` to prevent message bleeding, mapping chat persistence against PostgreSQL tables.
acceptance_criteria: Messages buffer securely guaranteeing delivery regardless of momentary mobile disconnection.

FR-14.title: Bind Generic Push Notification Microservice
FR-14.description: Execute Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) wrappers binding native generic event strings capturing APNS/FCM device tokens upon native login sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Tokens rotate and invalidate flawlessly if Member effectively logs out or deletes local OS instance.

FR-15.title: Build POS Interface for Front Desk iPad
FR-15.description: Construct generic lightweight Vue web app scaling beautifully explicitly constrained across common Tablet horizontal orientations generating instant cart executions.
acceptance_criteria: Appends 'Charge to Account' option isolating member mapping queries reliably.

FR-16.title: Implement Simple Leads Pipeline Columns
FR-16.description: Design standard generic CRM Trello-esque pipeline in Admin console explicitly organizing 'Cold', 'Tour Scheduled', 'Completed Tour', 'Won' lists.
acceptance_criteria: Provides quick generic modal attaching notes uniformly tracking interaction logs.

FR-17.title: Engineer IP-Bounded Clock-In Endpoints
FR-17.description: Force staff timesheet mutation validations resolving explicitly against the strictly configured facility Static IP blocking generic geolocation spoofing externally.
acceptance_criteria: Fails reliably delivering clear 'Must be physically connected to gym Wi-Fi' messaging.

FR-18.title: Class Completion Review Prompter UI
FR-18.description: Inject an organic native prompt interrupting generic dashboard focus explicitly appearing sequentially exactly 10 minutes post class termination tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Modal limits generic dismissals securely prompting 'Remind Later' fallback optionally.

FR-19.title: Build Dynamic Guest Referral Engine
FR-19.description: Create nested unique Referral UUIDs binding to exact profile generation mutating standard generic guest limitations automatically tracking downline revenue splits.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-injects fixed $20 Stripe customer balance uniformly upon guest conversion payload trigger.

FR-20.title: Establish Real-Time Churn Analysis Matrix
FR-20.description: Write intensive nested generic aggregate SQL functions isolating generic check-in latency correlating strongly natively determining strict risk parameters pushing output vectors heavily.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard visually color codes 'At-Risk' members securely explicitly guiding trainer interventions.
